items.name: theme
items.title: Theme
items.description: The swiftcn design-token system: Theme struct in the SwiftUI environment, adaptive light/dark colors, the Tailwind palette, and the default zinc theme.

items.name: chat-block
items.title: Chat Block
items.description: shadcn/ui's `chat-01` block as a ready-made screen: a contact header (avatar, name, email, new-conversation button) over a bottom-anchored `SCMessageScroller` and an `SCChatInputBar`.

items.name: dashboard-block
items.title: Dashboard Block
items.description: shadcn/ui's `dashboard-01` block as a ready-made screen: an `SCSidebarLayout(collapsible: .icon)` with a compact navigation sidebar and a scrolling detail pane of stat cards (adaptive grid: four across on regular widths, 2×2 on compact), an "Overview" bar chart card, and a "Recent Sales" card.

items.name: login-block
items.title: Login Block
items.description: A complete login screen — the swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's `login-01` block.

items.name: settings-block
items.title: Settings Block
items.description: A complete settings screen — the grouped-cards layout every iOS app ships: a profile card, a preferences card (switches + theme select), and a danger zone.

items.name: sidebar-block
items.title: Sidebar Block
items.description: shadcn/ui's `sidebar-07` block as a ready-made screen: an `SCSidebarLayout(collapsible: .icon)` with an app-identity header, "Platform" and "Projects" navigation groups (including a nested sub-menu), and a user footer.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that each reveal a section of content.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Displays an inline callout for user attention — shadcn's `Alert`.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog
items.description: Presents a modal confirmation dialog — swiftcn's `AlertDialog`.

items.name: aurora
items.title: Aurora
items.description: A soft, slowly drifting color wash — large blurred circles moving on sinusoidal paths over `theme.background`, the magicui aurora look.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Displays a small status pill.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: Displays the path to the current resource using a hierarchy of links.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: swiftcn's button appearance for native SwiftUI `Button`s — the cva `buttonVariants` of this library.

items.name: button-group
items.title: Button Group
items.description: A row of attached buttons sharing one container — shadcn's Button Group.

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: A month-view date grid — shadcn's Calendar (react-day-picker look) rebuilt on Foundation's `Calendar`, so the week start, weekday symbols, and numerals all follow the user's locale rather than assuming a Sunday-first English calendar.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: A themed surface for grouping related content — the swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's compound Card.

items.name: carousel
items.title: Carousel
items.description: A horizontally paging carousel with dot indicators and optional previous/next controls — the swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's Carousel.

items.name: chart
items.title: Chart
items.description: Applies swiftcn's chart theming to Swift Charts content: the theme's series palette, muted axis labels, and hairline grid lines.

items.name: chat
items.title: Chat
items.description: A single chat bubble — the smallest unit of the chat suite.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Checkbox appearance for native SwiftUI `Toggle`s — a square check control in place of the platform switch.

items.name: collapsible
items.title: Collapsible
items.description: An interactive panel that expands and collapses.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Combobox
items.description: A searchable select — the swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's Combobox (Popover + Command).

items.name: command
items.title: Command
items.description: One executable entry in a command list: a title, optional icon and shortcut hint, extra search keywords, and the action to run.

items.name: date-picker
items.title: Date Picker
items.description: An input-look trigger that opens an `SCCalendar` in a popover — shadcn's Date Picker composition.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: The styled panel of a dialog: themed surface, border, shadow, and an automatic close button wired to `\.scDismissDialog`.

items.name: dot-pattern
items.title: Dot Pattern
items.description: A dotted background pattern, drawn in a single `Canvas` pass — the magicui `DotPattern` port.

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: The drawer panel: a centered grabber above your content, on the themed background with rounded top corners.

items.name: empty
items.title: Empty
items.description: A centered empty state — the swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's Empty and the themed cousin of `ContentUnavailableView`.

items.name: field
items.title: Field
items.description: A form field — shadcn's Field (the 2025 replacement for Form).

items.name: hover-card
items.title: Hover Card
items.description: Presents a rich preview card when the pointer hovers the view — the swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's HoverCard, for sighted users previewing content behind a link.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: A themed single-line text field — shadcn's Input on a native `TextField`.

items.name: input-otp
items.title: Input OTP
items.description: One-time-code entry — shadcn's InputOTP.

items.name: item
items.title: Item
items.description: A generic list row — the swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's Item.

items.name: kbd
items.title: Kbd
items.description: A tiny keycap chip for displaying keyboard shortcuts — the swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's Kbd.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: A form label — shadcn's Label.

items.name: marquee
items.title: Marquee
items.description: Scrolls its content in an endless horizontal loop — the magicui `Marquee` port.

items.name: number-ticker
items.title: Number Ticker
items.description: Animates numeric changes by rolling each digit into place — the magicui `NumberTicker` port, built on `contentTransition(.numericText)`.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Page navigation with previous/next links and a windowed row of page numbers — the swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's Pagination.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Presents a themed, anchored popover — shadcn's Popover built on the native `.popover`, which supplies anchoring, the arrow, and tap-outside dismissal.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: swiftcn's linear progress bar for native `ProgressView`s — behavior and accessibility stay native; this supplies the style layer only.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: A set of mutually exclusive options.

items.name: resizable
items.title: Resizable
items.description: A two-pane split view with a draggable divider — the swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's Resizable.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: A dropdown for choosing one value from a list, triggered from a control styled like an input field.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: A 1pt rule that visually divides content, in the theme's border color.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: The styled panel of a sheet: themed surface, a separator line on the side facing the content, and an automatic close button wired to `\.scDismissSheet`.

items.name: shimmer
items.title: Shimmer
items.description: A call-to-action button with a highlight that endlessly travels its border — the v1 `ShimmerButton`, rebuilt on `SCButtonStyle` and theme tokens.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Sidebar
items.description: Shared sidebar state — the SwiftUI analog of shadcn's `SidebarProvider` + `useSidebar` hook.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: A placeholder block shown while content is loading, with a subtle shimmer sweep — shadcn's `Skeleton`.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: A themed range input — the swiftcn take on shadcn's Slider.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: An indeterminate loading indicator: a rotating arc that fades from `mutedForeground` into `primary`.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: shadcn's switch appearance for native SwiftUI `Toggle`s: a compact themed capsule track with a sliding thumb, label leading and control trailing — the same layout as the platform toggle.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: A themed data table — the swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's Table.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: A set of layered sections of content — the swiftcn Tabs.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: A themed multi-line text area — shadcn's Textarea on a native `TextEditor`.

items.name: toast
items.title: Toast
items.description: A single toast notification — swiftcn's port of a Sonner toast.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: shadcn's Toggle: a two-state pressed button (think a toolbar Bold button), not a switch.

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: Toggle Group
items.description: A horizontal set of toggle buttons sharing one bordered container — shadcn's ToggleGroup (outline look).

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Shows a small text bubble beside the view — the swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's Tooltip.

items.name: typography
items.title: Typography
items.description: shadcn `h1` — large title, bold, tight tracking.
